title: Mission Bloody Mary
writer: Sandro Continenza, Marcello Coscia, Sergio Grieco
actors: Ken Clark, Helga Liné, Philippe Hersent
plot: The first Euro-spy of 3 that Ken Clark as Agent 077 starred in the 60's. Mission Bloody Mary is the search and destroy mission to retrieve a Nuclear Bomb from a radical crime syndicate called the Black Lily. The European answer to...
